apiKey.description: To obtain the API Key, go to the Iterable app and naviate to Integrations > API Keys. Create a new API Key with the 'Server-Side' type.
apiKey.label: API Key

dataCenterLocation.description: The location where your Iterable data is hosted.
dataCenterLocation.label: Data Center Location

actions.name: Cart Updates
actions.description: Updates the shoppingCartItems field on the user profile.

fields.label: User Data
fields.description: Updates user data or adds a user if none exists

user.title: User Data
user.description: Updates user data or adds a user if none exists

email.title: Email Address
email.description: An email address that identifies a user profile in Iterable.

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: A user ID that identifies a user profile in Iterable.

mergeNestedObjects.title: Merge Nested Objects
mergeNestedObjects.description: If you'd like to merge (rather than overwrite) a user profile's top-level objects with the values provided for them in the request body, set mergeNestedObjects to true.

dataFields.title: User Data Fields
dataFields.description: Data to store on the user profile.

phoneNumber.title: User Phone Number
phoneNumber.description: User phone number. Must be a valid phone number including country code. e.g. +14158675309

fields.label: Cart items
fields.description: Individual items in the cart. Each item must contain `id`, `name`, `price`, and `quantity`. Extra values are added to dataFields.

items.title: Cart items
items.description: Individual items in the cart. Each item must contain `id`, `name`, `price`, and `quantity`. Extra values are added to dataFields.

id.title: Product Id
id.description: The unique identifier of the commerce item in the cart.

name.title: Product Name
name.description: The name or title of the product in the cart.

sku.title: Product SKU
sku.description: The Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) code that identifies the specific product.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the cart.

price.title: Price
price.description: The unit price of the product in the cart.

description.title: Product Description
description.description: A brief description of the product in the cart.

categories.title: Product Category
categories.description: A category name or label associated with the product in the cart.

url.title: Product URL
url.description: The URL to view or purchase the product in the cart.

imageUrl.title: Product Image URL
imageUrl.description: The URL of an image representing the product in the cart.

actions.name: Custom Event
actions.description: Track a custom event to a user profile
actions.defaultTrigger: type = "track" and event != "Order Completed" and event != "Cart Updated"

fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: An email address that identifies a user profile in Iterable.

email.title: Email Address
email.description: An email address that identifies a user profile in Iterable.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: A user ID that identifies a user profile in Iterable.

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: A user ID that identifies a user profile in Iterable.

fields.label: Event name
fields.description: Name of the event

fields.label: Event Data Fields
fields.description: Additional event properties.

fields.label: Event ID
fields.description: A unique ID. If an event exists with that id, the event will be updated

id.title: Event ID
id.description: A unique ID. If an event exists with that id, the event will be updated

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: Time the event took place.

fields.label: Campaign ID
fields.description: Iterable campaign the event can be attributed to.

campaignId.title: Campaign ID
campaignId.description: Iterable campaign the event can be attributed to.

fields.label: Template ID
fields.description: Iterable template the event can be attributed to.

templateId.title: Template ID
templateId.description: Iterable template the event can be attributed to.

fields.label: Enable Batching
fields.description: When enabled, Segment will send data to Iterable in batches of up to 1001

enable_batching.title: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: When enabled, Segment will send data to Iterable in batches of up to 1001

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

fields.label: Order ID
fields.description: Similar to `Event ID` in custom events. Iterable recommends mapping `order_id` or `messageId`. If a purchase exists with that id, the purchase will be updated. If none is specified, a new id will automatically be generated by Iterable

id.title: Order ID
id.description: Similar to `Event ID` in custom events. Iterable recommends mapping `order_id` or `messageId`. If a purchase exists with that id, the purchase will be updated. If none is specified, a new id will automatically be generated by Iterable
